import shutil, os, json
d=os.path.expanduser('~/Programming/PseudoCoup_v0/DevComms/hostruns/results')
src='app/build/walks/scenario_kt'
if not os.path.isdir(src):
    print('NO SCENARIO_KT DIR'); raise SystemExit
dst=d+'/244_scenario_kt'
shutil.copytree(src, dst, dirs_exist_ok=True)
pngs=sorted(f for f in os.listdir(dst) if f.endswith('.png'))
print('kt scenario screenshots:', len(pngs))
for p in pngs: print(' ', p)
lp=dst+'/scenario_kt_log.json'
if os.path.exists(lp):
    L=json.load(open(lp))
    steps=L if isinstance(L,list) else L.get('steps',[])
    for s in steps:
        print('step', s.get('index'), s.get('name'), '| found=', s.get('found'), '| route=', s.get('route_after'))
